message:
fix(beads): translate GT_DOLT_PORT to BEADS_DOLT_PORT for bd subprocesses

Gas Town uses GT_DOLT_PORT; beads uses BEADS_DOLT_PORT. Without this
translation, bd subprocesses spawned by gastown (both isolated and
non-isolated) fell back to the metadata.json port 3307 (production),
causing hundreds of test databases to leak onto the production server.

translateDoltPort() bridges the two env var conventions. Both
buildRunEnv() and buildRoutingEnv() now apply the translation.

Fixes: hq-27t (12 clown noses and counting)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
